_comment: Copy to ~/.claude/sustain/strict.json. ironGate=true makes Iron-2 a hard gate. Default off preserves v0.5 warn-only behavior. bypassPatterns is a list of substrings; if any appears in a Task prompt, the gate is skipped. Pre-seeded entries below cover oh-my-claudecode (OMC) agent dispatchers and superpowers built-in subagents — extend as needed.
